calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-23-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:54am
Judge Pro Tem Steven Kipperman, clerk-Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Kung Yuen Chiu appears with his attorney Herbert Yanowitz. Respondents Wah Leung Lew and Sylvia Lew appear in pro per. Parties, Previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to question from Judge Kipperman.

Previous exhibits are returned to Sylvia Lew.

EXHR (1) Plantiffs allegations, multiple page document.
EXHA (A) 3 pages of drawings dated 11/2/05.
EXHA (B) 2 pages, permit tracking document
EXHA (C) 4 photos
EXHA (D) 2 pages of drawings
EXHA (E) Several pages of drawings (rolled and banded)
EXHA (F) 2 page project review application
EXHA (G) 2 page hand written letters dated 12/08/06
EXHA (H) Letter form KY Chiu to neighbors
EXHA (I) List of 5 names - record of outreach
EXHA (J) Application for permit
EXHA (K) Application for demolition permit
EXHA (L) Plans for demolition

10:52 am
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Apr-07-2010 Judgment Entered
